description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, jagged surface and a predominantly gray coloration. The rock displays a variety of textures, with some faces appearing more angular and sharp, while others are flatter and slightly smoother. Small speckles and inclusions of darker minerals are visible throughout, giving the rock a mottled appearance. The edges are uneven, with some thin, pointed sections and broader, blockier areas. Its surface is matte and non-reflective, suggesting a natural, unpolished state. The rock appears dense and solid, typical of stones found in urban landscaping or as natural obstacles.
description: A rough, gray, irregularly shaped rock with jagged edges and a mottled, speckled surface.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, uneven face with visible speckles and a slightly concave area near the top.
description_view_1: This side reveals a sharp, triangular profile with a pronounced pointed tip and a thin edge.
description_view_2: This angle highlights a blockier, more massive face with a rugged, coarse texture and less pronounced points.
description_view_3: This view displays a relatively flat, thin surface with subtle undulations and a lighter gray tone.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
